title: Momentary Unity at a Funeral Masks Deep Divisions Among Iran’s Leaders
summary_full: Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei’s absence has raised questions inside Iranian political circles about who is really running the country and allowed open divisions to fester.
summary_public: Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei’s absence has raised questions inside Iranian political circles about who is really running the country and allowed open divisions to fester.

IR.label: neutral
